title: Privacy Policy
description: How 1Grow collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
content:
## Information We Collect

### Account Information

When you create an account, we collect your name, email address, phone number, and business details.

### Usage Data

We collect information about how you use the platform, including features accessed, actions taken, and time spent.

### Payment Information

Payment processing is handled by third-party providers. We do not store your credit card details.

## How We Use Your Information

- To provide and maintain the service
- To send transactional emails and notifications
- To improve the platform based on usage patterns
- To comply with legal obligations

## Data Security

We implement industry-standard security measures including:

- AES-256 encryption at rest
- TLS 1.3 encryption in transit
- Role-based access control
- Regular security audits

## Data Retention

Your data is retained as long as your account is active. Upon deletion, data is removed within 30 days.

## Your Rights

You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. Contact us at privacy@1Grow.com.

## Contact

For privacy-related inquiries, email privacy@1Grow.com.

title: Terms & Conditions
description: The legal terms governing your use of the 1Grow platform.
content:
## Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using 1Grow, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions.

## Service Description

1Grow is a cloud-based business management platform for Training Institutes, Rental Businesses, and Event Management Companies.

## Account Responsibilities

- You are responsible for maintaining account security
- You must provide accurate registration information
- You are liable for all activity under your account

## Subscription Terms

- Subscriptions are billed monthly or annually
- Free trials convert to paid subscriptions unless cancelled
- Refunds are available within 14 days of purchase

## Acceptable Use

You agree not to:

- Use the service for illegal purposes
- Attempt to gain unauthorized access
- Interfere with platform operations
- Resell or redistribute the service

## Limitation of Liability

1Grow shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.

## Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these terms. Continued use constitutes acceptance of changes.

title: Cookie Policy
description: How we use cookies and similar technologies on our website.
content:
## What Are Cookies

Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit our website.

## Types of Cookies We Use

### Essential Cookies

Required for the platform to function. Cannot be disabled.

### Analytics Cookies

Help us understand how visitors interact with our website.

### Preference Cookies

Remember your settings and preferences.

## Managing Cookies

You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling essential cookies may affect platform functionality.

## Third-Party Cookies

We use third-party services that may set their own cookies:

- Google Analytics
- Vercel Analytics
- Payment processors

## Contact

For questions about our cookie policy, email privacy@1Grow.com.

title: Refund Policy
description: Our refund and cancellation terms for subscriptions and payments.
content:
## Free Trial

The 20-day free trial can be cancelled at any time without charge.

## Subscription Refunds

### Within 14 Days

Full refund if requested within 14 days of initial purchase.

### After 14 Days

Refunds are prorated based on remaining subscription time.

## How to Request a Refund

1. Log in to your account
2. Go to Settings > Billing
3. Click Request Refund
4. Provide a reason

## Processing Time

Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days to the original payment method.

## Exceptions

Refunds may not be available if:

- The account was used in violation of terms
- The refund request is made after 30 days
- Promotional or discounted purchases

## Contact

For refund inquiries, email billing@1Grow.com.

title: Data Processing Policy
description: How 1Grow processes and handles your business data.
content:
## Data Processing Overview

1Grow acts as a data processor for business data entered by users.

## Data Ownership

You retain full ownership of all data entered into the platform. We do not use your business data for marketing or sell it to third parties.

## Data Processing Locations

Data is processed and stored in data centers located in India. We comply with local data protection regulations.

## Sub-processors

We use the following sub-processors:

- **Vercel**: Hosting and CDN
- **AWS**: Infrastructure
- **Brevo**: Email delivery
- **Firebase**: Push notifications

## Data Breach Notification

In the event of a data breach, we will notify affected users within 72 hours.

## Contact

For data processing inquiries, email dpo@1Grow.com.

title: Accessibility Statement
description: Our commitment to making 1Grow accessible to everyone.
content:
## Our Commitment

1Grow is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities.

## Standards

We aim to conform to WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.

## Current Status

The platform has been designed with accessibility in mind:

- Keyboard navigation support
- Screen reader compatibility
- Sufficient color contrast
- Semantic HTML structure
- ARIA labels on interactive elements

## Known Limitations

- Some older content may not meet all accessibility standards
- Third-party integrations may have their own accessibility limitations

## Feedback

We welcome feedback on accessibility issues. Contact us at accessibility@1Grow.com.

## Assessment Methods

- Automated testing with axe-core
- Manual testing with screen readers
- User feedback and testing

title: Disclaimer
description: Legal disclaimers regarding the use of 1Grow and its content.
content:
## General Disclaimer

The information provided by 1Grow is for general informational purposes only.

## No Warranty

The platform is provided as is without warranties of any kind, either express or implied.

## Accuracy of Information

We strive to keep information accurate but make no warranties about the completeness, reliability, or accuracy of this information.

## External Links

Our platform may contain links to external sites. We are not responsible for the content of external sites.

## Professional Advice

The platform does not provide professional advice. Consult qualified professionals for specific business decisions.

## Limitation of Liability

1Grow shall not be liable for any losses or damages arising from the use of this platform.

## Contact

For disclaimer-related inquiries, email legal@1Grow.com.
